description: Missing-promo_code, surrounding-whitespace rejections, confirm gate, and the promo POST body. Both languages now share Go's whitespace check and texts.

cases.name: rejects promo_code with surrounding whitespace
cases.expect_error: promo_code must not include leading or trailing whitespace
